message:
feat(web): Enhance Setup wizard with step-based content and animations

- Add step-based wizard flow (Detect → Install → Verify)
- Add framer-motion animations and page transitions
- Add confirmation modal before tool installations
- Add progress tracking with visual feedback
- Auto-complete steps when environment is ready
- Improve accessibility and user guidance

Implements frontend UI portion of flywheel_gateway-xli.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
